titleStmt.title: SII 28.24: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 24. (A.R. No. 24 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, south wall, the maṇḍapa in front of

p.hi: Tribhuvanachakravartti-Parākrama-pāṇḍya Year 2, Vṟiśchika, ba. di 3, Friday, Punarpūśam = 1336, A.D. November 22.

summary.p: This is a record of a royal gift of the village [Kaḻanivāyil] alias Parākramapāṇḍya-nallūr (?) as dēvadāna-iṟai-ili (tax-free land in favour of the God) to God Tirukkuraṅkāḍu-tuṟai-uḍaiyār Kuṟṟam-poṟuttaruḷiyanāyanār of brahmadēyam Iṟaiyāṉ-puṉchey in Ugaḷūr-kūṟṟam in Vaḍakarai-Rājasiṁha-vaḷanāḍu, for the celebration of a festival in (the month) of Puraṭṭādi to culminate on the day of Pūrāḍam, the birth-asterism of the king. The grant included the right to the habitations (nattam), wet and dry lands, irrigation facilities and the cash levies on account of the ūr. It appears that the entitlements of Ariyalūr-uḍaiyāṉ Aruḷāḷa-pperumāḷ-mudaliyār and consorts (deified personalities ?) were exempted from the purview of the grant. The record was authenticated by Īrāja-sundara-dēvar, Kappalūruḍaiyāṉ Kāliṅgarājan and Maṇa[m-a]manta-Puttūr-uḍaiyā[ṉ] Villavarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . koṉermel koṇṭāṉ tribhuvaṉa cakkravarttikaḷ
śrīparākramapāṇḍya devaṟku yāṇṭu ñ vṛścikanāyaṟṟu kaparapa
kṣattu tṛtiyaiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ vaṭa
karai rājasiṁha vaḷanāṭṭu Ukaḷurk kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam Iṟaiyāṉ puṉcey tirukkuraṅ
kāṭu tuṟai Uṭaiyār kuṟṟam poṟuttaruḷiya nāyanāṟkku nam perālk kaṭṭiṉa can
tikku nam janmanakṣatram pūrāṭam tirtthamāka Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa puraṭṭātit tirunāḷukkum U
ṭalāka nām tanta tevatāna Iṟaiyiliyāvatu vempārṉāṭṭuk kiḻ kūṟṟu
kaḻaṉi vāyi ṉa parākramapāṇḍya nallū kiḻpār
ru viruppu Iṟaiyilikkum devatāṉa Iṟaiyili Ukaḷūr Ellaikku meṟku
teṉpārkku Ellai Innāyiṉār tevatānamāṉa tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyili Aticūtamaṅkalattu Ellaikku tattaṉū
r Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpārkku Ellai perunelkkuṉṟattu Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkku Ellai
Innāyiṉār cevatāṉaRead tevatāṉaIṟaiyili vākaiyūr Āṭkoṇṭanallūr Āṟṟu bhāgāśrayattu
kkum teṟkuteṟkum inserted above the line.Iṉṉāṉku Ellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nattaṅkaḷum naṉcey puṉceykaḷum Eriyum vāykkāl prātti
kkaḷumRead prāptikaḷumIvvūrāl varum kāṇikkai nāṭṭu viṉiyokam maṉaiiṟai cekkuiṟai Uḷḷiṭṭa kācu Āyavaṟ
kaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa �tyavatu cella mutal Aṭaṅkalum Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom
Ippaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka tulyam 2 Ippaṭikku Ivai Īrā[jacu]ntara
tevar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kappalūruṭaiyāṉ kāliṅkarājan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai maṇam Amanta puttūruṭaiyāṉ villavarāyar Eḻuttu § Iṉṉāyiṉār tevatānam
kaḻaṉivācal Ūraṭaṅkalum Ūramaipattu Itil Ariyalūruṭaiyāṉ Aruḷāḷap pe
rumāḷ mutaliyāṟkum nācciyāṟkum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikku Udakapūrvvamākat tanta
Ūramai Iraṇṭaraiyum tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyili Ivvūril
l vanta kaḷum Aṉupavittuk koḷḷavum śivamastu §
Digital edition of SII 28.24 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
